CONTENT.Career: Engels began his career at the youth academy of Club Brugge. On 22 August 2020, Engels made his debut for Brugge's reserve side, Club NXT in the Belgian First Division B against RWDM47. He was a starter as NXT lost 2–0.On 3 January 2023, Engels signed for Bundesliga club FC Augsburg on a four-and-a-half-year contract.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the UEFA websiteBelgium profile at Belgian FA

SUMMARY: Arne Engels (born 8 September 2003) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder, right-back or right winger for Bundesliga club FC Augsburg.
